node.text: The new National Comedy Center is a celebration of comedy: past, present, and future. To commemorate it, 6 comedians and Microsoft AI came together for a Laugh Battle Royale. Click into our story for more.
@King5Seattle is creating a new approach to storytelling with Power BI. “Data can enrich and authenticate a story to make sure you know the news is legitimate,” says anchor/reporter Jake Whittenberg.

Former pro football player Steve Gleason is on quest to find a cure for ALS. His nonprofit @TeamGleason helped inspire #AnswerALS–a project that's building the most comprehensive collection of data on people living with the disease.

This is where the magic happens. ✨ Our own @MarkSchaeferMagic performed tricks at @MarysPlaceWA’s annual fundraiser this year. We're thankful for the contribution he made during our Employee Giving Campaign in October.
We're proud to celebrate and support #VeteransDay. Our programs provide veterans and military families the skills and knowledge needed to succeed in the digital future.
Our president Brad Smith spoke at #WebSummit today about the importance of digital peace in the age of cyberwarfare. Watch our story and sign the petition to demand Digital Peace Now.

We joined several companies in the Pacific Northwest to light our buildings blue in tribute to @officialpaulallen. He was our co-founder, a philanthropist, a big thinker, and a civic leader. The region is filled with reminders of his legacy. #ThanksPaul
Our new Azure Cloud Collaboration Center is a state-of-the-art facility here at Microsoft HQ. It's built with a vision of what businesses can do with the cloud. ☁️
🔔 Our EVP of business development Peggy Johnson rang @Nasdaq’s closing bell today— marking how our partnership using blockchain makes business easier and more secure.

Some of the world’s most extraordinary hardware labs are hidden behind nondescript exteriors. Industrial sewing machines and the next generation of smart fabrics used for Surface devices are housed in #Building87.
Led by cricket legend Anil Kumble, Spektacom uses tiny sensors placed on the bat handle to unpack the science of hitting. It’s a new way for fans to appreciate the game they love.
Started as a backyard operation, @GardenPool now utilizes technology to spread sustainable farming methods around the world. 🌎
College senior Sydney Frankenberg said she was inspired to lead after interviewing CEO Satya Nadella during his visit to @USNavalAcademy. 🚢 🌊  Thanks for having us.
🎧 The smarter way to listen. Active noise cancellation, rich audio, Bluetooth connectivity and on-ear touch controls. Welcome to the family, Surface Headphones.

The particle is called a Majorana fermion, and until just a few years ago, physicists weren’t sure it existed. Now, we’re working toward building quantum devices using this quasi-particle in devices that operate at temperatures almost 200 times colder than the farthest reaches of outer space.
#quantumcomputing #majoranafermion #topologicalqubit
@originalfunko went from a small bobblehead business to a global company with help from technology. Click into our story for more.

In 1992, Dr. Mae Jemison became the first woman of color in space. Today we have the opportunity to partner with her and @SmithsonianMagazine to create Defying Gravity: Women in Space, a mixed reality experience celebrating the inspiring women of the U.S. space program. #WomenMakingHistory

node.text: Announcing new @surface devices, including #SurfacePro6, #SurfaceLaptop2, #SurfaceStudio2, and #SurfaceHeadphones, the launch of @windows 10 October Update and new @office features - all designed to empower everyone to make the most of every moment. #microsoftevent

Today at #MSIgnite, we launched the Open Data Initiative with @Adobe and @SAP. Together, we will help companies connect their data and deliver better customer experiences. See more from Ignite at microsoft.com/ignite
Greetings from #Orlando. 🌞 #MSIgnite kicks off Monday morning at 9AM ET with a keynote by Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella. Watch it live at Microsoft.com/Ignite

For nearly two decades, the Nasdaq video tower has illuminated Times Square with 19 million LEDs and seven stories of screens. 🏙️ To share the MarketSite experience with international audiences, they're taking their livestreaming services to the cloud.

Learn more by clicking the link in our bio.

node.text: If you can see it, you can be it. Bonnie Ross, head of 343 Industries, brings the Halo world to life. Now, she's partnering with the Ad Council to inspire the next generation of women in STEM.

"You've got to look somewhere other than where everyone else is looking." - @rohitbb 
Click into our story for more on the near-futurist using sticky notes and data visualization to identify and curate trends.
It’s beginning to feel like fall on campus. Double tap if you’re ready for autumn 🍁🐌 #slugsofmicrosoft #therealslugsofmicrosoft

node.text:
"We're shifting the way we think about sound design at Microsoft, and hopefully the industry at large. Our goal is to help orchestrate harmony across devices and senses." - Matthew Bennett, Head of Sound + Sensory Design at Microsoft 🔊

Learn more about Matthew and his approach to creating sound experiences by clicking the link in our bio.
In Building 87, dozens of DSLR cameras capture 3D headshots so we can create simulations for devices like HoloLens, optimizing visual display and physical fit.

Together with @WEMovement, we’re celebrating innovators who are committed to using tech to make the world more inclusive. Click into our story to learn about one inclusive app, built by brothers. #WEDay

You can learn a lot by simply listening. Researchers with The Elephant Listening Project are pairing acoustic monitors in the grasslands with the latest AI technologies to learn more about endangered African elephants. Click the link in our bio for more. 🐘 📷: WWF ©Bea Binka

Through hours of intense work using mixed reality technology, Mel Chin’s 𝘜𝘯𝘮𝘰𝘰𝘳𝘦𝘥 takes center stage in Times Square, using HoloLens to submerge visitors underwater as they’re shown the impact of climate change. Check out our Story for more.

node.text: Olympic snowboarding gold medalist @ChloeKim knows what it takes to win: passion, patience, and moving beyond the idea of a “perfect score.” Learn how she continues raising the bar in this conversation with our CEO Satya Nadella.
Congratulations to our 2018 Imagine Cup World Finals winners, team smartARM 🏆 Click into our story to learn more about the team and their project.

49 teams from across the world are at Microsoft headquarters to compete for the 2018 #ImagineCup (and up to $100K)! 💰 Watch the Championship live July 25 at 9:00am PT. 
Swipe into our story to see more.

node.text: Our new partnership with @InsideNatGeo enables the next generation of conservation scientists to reach new heights (or dive deep) with #AI. ⛰️🌎🌊
The competition is heating up. In partnership with Special Olympics Athletes and Unified Partners, Washington hosted the first ever gaming tournament of the #2018USAGames. 🎮🏅
The @specialolympicsusagames is about much more than sports. We're proud to cheer on 4,000 athletes from 50 states and show the world together we can achieve more.
@EmanCarrillo is an industrial designer and DIY enthusiast who competitively engineers, builds, and battles robots in his free time. For this maker, it's all about what's under the surface. 🤖💻
We see you, #SeattlePride. It was a great day out in the sun with over 400 employees and their supporters. Seattle is 1 of 29 #Pride⁠ ⁠celebrations we're marching in this year. #MicrosoftLife
Celebrating #SeattlePride with 400 employees and friends ✌🏿️🏳️‍🌈✌🏽️💛✌🏻

London College of Fashion students came together for the Future of Fashion Incubator, a special program aimed at using Microsoft technology to disrupt the fashion industry. They worked to think outside the garment, weaving sustainability, virtual retail, AI stylists, and other creative solutions into the fabric of the industry’s future.

Microsoft distinguished engineer Doug Burger holds #ProjectBrainwave, a chip tailored for rapid calculations, but designed with forward-thinking flexibility. 
#ProjectBrainwave is adept at image recognition and running other deep learning algorithms, with less than a millisecond spent per operation.

After a trip to Afghanistan, French architect Yves Ubelmann was inspired to start @Ic0nem, a company that uses AI and drones to create 3D digital models of historic landmarks threatened by war, conflict, time and nature.

Imagine putting 864 servers at the bottom of the ocean. That's exactly what we're doing with #ProjectNatick, a self-sufficient 40-foot long underwater datacenter we just launched off the coast of Scotland. 🌊💨

For nearly three decades, we've stood with the LGBTQ+ community. This year, we're marching in over forty #Pride parades and fighting harder than ever for human rights in the workplace and around the world. Check out our Story to learn more. 🌎✌🏼️🏳️‍🌈✌🏿️❤️

Dr. Moses Owoicho Enokela is tackling maternal mortality, seeking to give pregnant women the information and diagnoses they need to deliver their babies safely. His #Insiders4Good fellowship helps him do more to save lives in his community.
Game on. The new @Xbox Adaptive Controller will make gaming more accessible for a wide range of people. #GAAD
Today, our CEO Satya Nadella, shared our vision for a new era in technology, where the world is a computer and everyone is able to participate fully. We can't wait to see what you all build. #MSBuild
There's more to be seen beneath a Surface. This is the original "Pixel Sense" multi-touch project, started in Building 87's Edison Labs, right here in Redmond.

We had a vision for HoloLens, even back during the prototyping phase: to help people communicate, create, and learn in immersive experiences. Luckily we simplified the design of it a little since then. 🤓

node.text: We're exploring the future of manufacturing this week at #HM18. Meet YuMi® from @abbgroup. It uses #AI and the cloud to make intelligent decisions on the factory floor. This machine can thread a needle or build a box. Double tap to shake hands with YuMi®.
We're on a journey to remove obstacles for individuals and organizations on the frontline of environmental sustainability.

In the near future, nearly every device in your home and at work will be connected to the internet. But connectivity can lead to vulnerability. Today, we introduced #AzureSphere, a first-of-its-kind solution which will secure billions of these connected devices.

Our anechoic chamber in Building 87 is lined with wedge-shaped sound absorbers that take any vibration in the air and dampen it. This is the quietest place in the entire world, reaching -20.3 decibels. It's the optimal environment for our audio testing.
Team Tactile was accepted into the Microsoft #MakeWhatsNext Patent Program for developing a breakthrough device that turns text into Braille in real-time. 📷: Brian Smale / © Microsoft

It's not a stretch to say the 2018 Special Olympics USA Games are almost here. We're fully behind Andy Bryant, an elite runner working at Microsoft - and not just because he overtakes us on the track so swiftly. 🔥👟 📷: Scott Eklund / © Microsoft
Childhood clubhouse = the new conference room. Here in Redmond, we're taking our meetings to the trees as we rethink the modern workplace. 🌲

We collaborated with UW's Molecular Information Systems Lab to break the world record for the amount of digital data successfully stored and retrieved in DNA molecules. Here's our digital microfluidics automated DNA data-storage prototype. (Say that five times fast 😉🤓)
In just one year, Microsoft Teams has become the go-to collaboration tool for Macy's, NASCAR, General Motors and more. Today, we’re saying congrats to the team behind Teams with a cupcake (or two).

node.text:
It’s not about what technology can do. It’s about what you can do with it. 
We’re celebrating those who use AI to drive innovation.

Project Premonition aims to detect pathogens before they cause outbreaks. Microsoft researchers created this robotic mosquito trap which consists of 64 smart cells and captures interesting mosquitoes in milliseconds.

Toni Townes-Whitley, our CVP of Industry, spoke at last week’s “Meet Our Leaders” event with Microsoft employees. She encouraged employees to be curious—to stop and reflect on where we are; to be aware of our own views and biases.

"Technology sees no race. It sees no religion. It sees no socio-economic background. It's there for everyone, and I think that's a staple of inclusion." As part of our Create Change Program, we teamed up with NFL superstar @LarryFitzgerald in his efforts to bridge the digital divide and give more students access to opportunity-boosting technology. Learn more about the cause by clicking the link in our bio.

node.text:
When Hurricane Maria struck Puerto Rico, Microsoft employees stepped in to map the island to aid recovery efforts. 
Learn more about our philanthropic work by clicking the link in our bio.

The future of artificial intelligence is huge. To make sure we can grasp it, Microsoft researchers are developing a new class of machine learning tools to embed #AI onto breadcrumb-sized computer processors. 📷: Dan DeLong

We partnered with six NFL superstars, including @LarryFitzgerald, to share powerful stories of how they are working to make an impact in their local communities. The Larry Fitzgerald First Down Fund was established to help kids and their families by funding positive activities for kids during the summer and throughout the year, supporting kids and families in crisis, and supporting health-related organizations that work with families.

Learn more by clicking the link in our bio.

After winning the 15th annual #ImagineCup last summer, Team X.Glu participated in a mentoring session with Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella to discuss their project: a device that makes diabetes management easier and more accessible.

node.text: Tomorrow’s leaders are sitting in today’s classrooms. We're taking big steps to help prepare them for the digital future as we roll out six new augmented reality and virtual reality applications developed in partnership with Pearson.

The #FutureComputed explores the role of AI in society, like how it enables researchers to conduct pathogen detection in the environment before an outbreak even begins. Learn more by clicking the link in our bio.
KC Lemson is the social motivator and mastermind behind Microsoft’s #NinjaCat meme. Click the link in our bio to see how she brings passion and fun to the company she loves.

Around the world, Microsoft is committed to creating technology that empowers people to achieve more. Swipe to see some of our most popular feature stories from 2017, including:
• @detroitwallpaper co-founders Andi Kubacki and Josh Young,
• The launch of CEO Satya Nadella’s #HitRefresh book,
• A partnership with L V Prasad Eye Institute to create Connected Eyes,
• Non-profit @yuwaindia's partnership with Microsoft Edge to help young girls in rural India,
• Our vision for what's next in education, illustrated by @heyheysu, and
• The launch of the world's most powerful console, #XboxOneX.
Microsoft Stores are selecting and granting wishes that make an impact. Learn how you can submit a holiday wish to the #MicrosoftWishMachine by clicking the link in our bio.
The Seattle @Seahawks' DeShawn Shead loves a challenge. Data and sports science helped him face recovery rehab head on. Learn more by clicking the link in our bio.

node.text: Create a better world.
The new Microsoft Silicon Valley campus will be the first tech campus with Net-Zero Water certification. Learn more about Microsoft's smartest, greenest office yet by clicking the link in our bio.

“For them to be part of a community where they feel like they have worth is extremely powerful—it’s life-changing.” - Franz Gastler on the impact of his nonprofit, #Yuwa. Learn about our partnership with Franz and Yuwa by clicking the link in our bio.

18 new buildings. 6.7 million square feet of workspace. A transportation infrastructure overhaul. New sports fields and more. Learn all about the future of our Redmond campus by clicking the link in our bio. #MicrosoftLife

Yuwa School was founded in 2009 as a way to empower girls in rural India through sport and education. Since then, students have gone on to tell their stories all around India and the world, speaking at TEDx, universities, professional conferences, awards events and the FIFA Women’s World Cup. Learn more about Yuwa School by clicking the link in our bio.
At Deschutes Brewery in Oregon, craft beer is brewed with data and has distinct notes of cloud. 🍺 Pony up to the link in our bio to watch the latest episode of Work Reworked and learn more.

node.text: @YuwaIndia is using soccer and education to help girls in India become voices of change in their communities and beyond. Learn how Microsoft Edge helped bring a 360° story the girls created themselves to life by clicking the link in our bio.

“We built #XboxOneX to give game creators the most powerful platform to bring their visions to life and to give gamers the best console to play the games of the past, present, and future." Learn about the intensive planning, pure precision, and meticulous detail that went into building Xbox One X, the world's most powerful console, via the link in our bio.

We're partnering with the Boys & Girls Clubs of America to encourage kids to explore the world of computer science and seize the career opportunities of the future. Learn more by clicking the link in our bio.

node.text: Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella asks Coach @petecarroll how the @seahawks #hitrefresh every week - and every season. 🏈

We can't stop looking up. 🌲 Our new collaboration workspaces are nestled in the woods of our 500-acre Redmond, WA campus. Designed by @nelsontreehouse with a scientific eye, these spaces benefit our employees through the powerful impact that nature has on creativity, focus and happiness. #MicrosoftLife

On a recent visit to Lord's Cricket Ground, CEO Satya Nadella thinks back to his first brush with cricket on the pitches of Hyderabad, India.
He recounts leadership lessons learned from the sport in his new book, #HitRefresh. Learn more about the book through the link in our bio.

The designers behind the record-breaking Xbox One X share the intensive planning, challenges and pain-staking precision that went into the creation of Microsoft's most compact and powerful console yet. Read their full story by clicking the link in our bio.

node.text: SEQUENCE Collection is empowering young artists and disrupting the cycle of violence in El Salvador. We're supporting their mission by building 3D and AR digital tools that allow the artists to express their passions and positive energy to the world. Learn more by clicking the link in our bio.

Microsoft employees Edaena Salinas and Heather Shapiro are passionate about the advancement of women in technology. They're two of our employee ambassadors attending #GHC17 in Orlando this week. Learn more about them via the link in our bio, and be sure to stop by our booth if you're at the Grace Hopper Celebration.
It’s been an exciting week with the launch of our CEO Satya Nadella's book #HitRefresh. Learn more about the book by clicking the link in our bio.
#behindthescenes: Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella joins Richard Quest on @cnni at 4PM ET today. Tune in to hear them talk leadership, the tech industry, and Satya's new book #HitRefresh 📺

Behind the scenes at @cbsthismorning with @gayleking. Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella was on the show today, talking about his new book, #HitRefresh. 
If you missed it, you can catch it on CBS This Morning's YouTube channel.

Greetings from Orlando. We're here with 23,000 technology and business leaders for #msignite and #msenvision. @realmadrid, @pgatour, @fruitoftheloom, and @marcjacobs are just a few of the brands here showcasing their stories of #digitaltransformation.

We partnered with Facebook and Telxius to launch Marea, a 160-terabit cable that joins North America and Spain. It will give us enough capacity to stream 71 million HD videos at once. Learn more at the link in our bio. 🌎🌊
@FastCompany gives us the cover treatment. Read their in-depth look at our journey under CEO Satya Nadella, and read an exclusive excerpt from his new book, #HitRefresh. Link in bio.
It's been great welcoming @CreateCultivate to Microsoft campus today. This conference empowers and inspires entrepreneurial women, a mission we wholeheartedly support. #CreateCultivateSEA

Welcome to our home, @CreateCultivate. We're happy to host your event that inspires and empowers so many women. Check out our Instagram story and follow #createcultivatesea to see the amazing things happening on Microsoft campus today.
Women hold only 7.5% of patents. The women of the #MakeWhatsNext Patent Program are shifting the balance - and changing the world. Learn more by clicking the link in our bio.
